function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"capabilities": [{"name": "hello-endpoint", "lifecycle": "new", "description": "Add a /hello API endpoint to the Flask app that returns a JSON greeting message."}, {"name": "goodbye-endpoint", "lifecycle": "new", "description": "Add a /goodbye API endpoint to the Flask app that returns a JSON farewell message."}, {"name": "ui-integration", "lifecycle": "new", "description": "Update the JavaScript UI to fetch both /hello and /goodbye endpoints and display the messages.", "depends_on": ["hello-endpoint", "goodbye-endpoint"]}], "open_questions": []}
